_comment: Knockout matches per FIFA World Cup. One entry per match. Historical tournaments 1930-2022 are seeded; 2026 entries will be appended as the tournament progresses. Fields: year, phase (R16|QF|SF|3rd|Final), date (YYYY-MM-DD), home, away, score (regulation 'h-a'), extraTime (bool), penalties ('h-a' or null), winner (team name).
